##LOCALITY=N'Chwaning II mine, Kalahari manganese field, northern Cape Province, Republic of South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Group of black pseudo-octahedra with striations parallel to the (001) plane

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
